summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of WinDesk Cloud SaaS platform with extended admin features. All 30 backend API tests passed (100% success rate). Verified admin dashboard stats, 4 pre-built VMs, 3 default groups/roles/ACLs, policy creation, VM assignment, and dual connection options (TSplus + 1Panel).
passed_tests: API Health Check and Root Endpoint
User registration and login with proper cookie handling
Admin login with admin@windesk.cloud / Admin123! works
Order creation, payment simulation, and VM provisioning
VM management (metrics, restart, snapshot, access URLs)
GET /api/admin/vms returns 8 VMs including 4 PROD VMs (vm-prod-001 to 004)
GET /api/admin/groups returns 3 default groups (Desarrollo, Soporte Técnico, Finanzas)
GET /api/admin/roles returns 3 default roles (Administrador, Operador, Usuario)
GET /api/admin/acls returns 3 default ACLs (Acceso Completo, Solo Conexión, Solo Lectura)
VM assignment to users/groups works via PUT /api/admin/vms/{vm_id}
Access URL returns both tsplus_url and panel_url for dual connection options
All authentication flows work with proper JWT token handling
VM provisioning simulation completes with all steps
Admin panel APIs return proper seeded data
